prompt:
A sketchbook page showing a careful pencil drawing of Venus as a bright crescent phase, with a small circular inset indicating the telescope view. A compact eyepiece case and a soft cloth sit nearby; the page includes faint, illegible timestamp scribbles but no readable characters.
